title: 삼국지연의 : 한조재흥의 꿈
description:
Game IntroductionIn the twilight of the Eastern Han Dynasty, as the empire's mandate fades and rebellions ignite across the land, a grand ambition takes root in the heart of a humble straw mat seller. Three Kingdoms: Dream of Han Dynasty Revival is a Strategic Role-Playing Game (SRPG) based on the classic narrative of Romance of the Three Kingdoms. From the perspective of Liu Bei, players embark on a journey of hardship and glory to restore a crumbling dynasty.

Starting from the historic Oath in the Peach Garden, you will plunge into the vortex of a massive war for hegemony over Central China. You won't just follow history; you must bond with the heroes of this chaotic era and make critical decisions that may defy destiny itself. Stand against the Yellow Turban Rebellion of Zhang Jue (Guanghe), the tyranny of Dong Zhuo (Zhongping), and the soaring ambition of Cao Cao to realize your own vision of Han revival.

15 Unique Classes and a Sophisticated Rock-Paper-Scissors SystemEncounter infantry, cavalry, archers, and a total of 15 diverse classes that can shift the tides of battle. Each class possesses its own movement range, attack distance, and special abilities. The strategic core lies in the intricate counter-system between classes. Use archers to suppress enemy spearmen, or pierce through weaknesses with the mobility of cavalry. Through your command, even an ordinary unit can become an invincible elite force.

Advanced Psychological Warfare: The Stratagem SystemGo beyond simple brute force by utilizing stratagems that exploit terrain and weather. Whether it's a fire attack to throw enemies into confusion, a water attack leveraging the landscape, or an inspire command to boost ally morale—stratagems are the keys to overturning a disadvantageous battle. Managing your tacticians' MP efficiently and deploying stratagems at the perfect moment are essential for victory. Feel the thrill of crushing a vast army with your own tactical combinations.

Heroes of Chaos Reborn in Nostalgic Pixel ArtExperience high-quality dot graphics that blend nostalgia with a modern touch. The delicate pixel art captures the unique personality of each general, adding a warm sensibility to the tension of the battlefield. The meticulously crafted unit animations and flashy skill effects maximize the visual pleasure inherent in SRPGs, offering players an experience akin to watching a moving historical tapestry.

Elegant Melodies that Heighten Battlefield TensionThe soundtrack, a harmony of grand orchestral sounds and oriental melodies, elevates the sense of immersion. From lyrical tunes in peaceful villages to majestic, high-tension tracks during clashes between massive armies, the fluid music perfectly conveys the joy, anger, sorrow, and overwhelming atmosphere of the battlefield to the player.

The Pinnacle of Strategy: Over 50 Unique Battlefields and Scenario BranchesPrepare for over 50 main stages where terrain—such as plains, forests, mountains, and rivers—directly affects unit mobility and attack power. Every stage features unique victory conditions and gimmicks, offering deep tactical challenges. Furthermore, the choices you make throughout the scenario will completely alter the flow of the story. Whether you overcome the original tragedy to fulfill the dream of Han revival or disappear into the shadows of another history is entirely in your hands.

Gameplay MechanicsThis game focuses on recreating the nostalgia of classic SRPGs in a fresh way. The smooth unit movements and intuitive interface, realized through pixel graphics, provide an optimal environment for focusing solely on strategy. The growth systems—including unique officer traits, skill leveling, and the strategic use of equipment—add a layer of character-building fun. Every deliberate command made each turn, supported by beautiful graphics and music, will make your journey truly special.

description_short: Lead the revival of the falling empire by mastering strategic combat—utilizing the tactical advantages of 15 unique unit classes and powerful stratagems—across more than 50 dynamic battlefields.
